description: Use the test_driven optimizer to improve the complaint-generator intake questioning phase. Target files: adversarial_harness/session.py. Phase goal: Improve complainant and mediator questioning so intake exits with stronger factual, evidentiary, and anchor coverage. Recommended actions: Ask the complainant to walk step-by-step through protected activity, response, and adverse action so causation can be modeled directly.. Weak complaint types to generalize for: housing_discrimination, hacc_research_engine. Weak evidence modalities to improve: policy_document, file_evidence. Intake targets: causation_sequence, conduct, retaliation. Focus only on mediator/mediator.py. Target symbols: build_inquiry_gap_context.
